holdings.infoBox: MNZL is an equity ETF with a total of 464 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 14.57%, Broadcom at 6.22%, Micron Technology at 4.14%, Tesla at 3.97%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 3.10%.

overview.description: The Manzil Russell Halal USA Broad Market ETF (MNZL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large-cap stocks complying with Shariah principles and ethical investment standards. MNZL was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by Manzil.
infoTable: Russell Ideal Ratings Manzil Halal USA Broad Market Custom Index
